design.canonicalPairKey: TripSit keys sorted by drugs/combos.json order and joined with |, for example lsd|mdma.
design.entryId: Stable source-row id in the form wiki-combo-001.
design.searchRule: Use searchDocuments as the primary Fuse.js input for slang names, intoxication names, and source drug terms. Use bySlang only for exact normalized name lookup.
design.enrichmentRule: Use byPair[pairKey] to find Wikipedia rows relevant to a TripSit combo cell, and byTripSitKey[key] for substance cards. Preserve drugs/combos.json status/note as the safety source of truth; imported rows add slang, intoxication names, comments, and provenance.

antiretroviral drug.note: No antiretroviral TripSit combo key exists.

beta-carboline.note: Beta-carbolines such as harmala alkaloids are mapped to TripSit's MAOI key.

pharmaceutical.note: Too broad to map to a TripSit combo key.

2c-b.note: TripSit has a 2C-x class key, not individual 2C-B combo rows.

5-apb.note: Mapped to TripSit's MDMA/empathogen column for combo lookup.

any deliriant.note: Diphenhydramine is the only deliriant-like TripSit combo key present.

any pharmaceutical.note: Too broad to map to a TripSit combo key.

barbiturates.note: No barbiturate TripSit combo key exists.

lysergamides.note: TripSit has LSD rather than a lysergamide class key.

wiki-combo-004.comment: Polypharmacy is most commonly defined as the use of five or more medications daily by an individual. However, the definition of polypharmacy is still debated and can vary from two to 11 concurrent medications.

sourceSlots.plain: Any β-Carboline containing plant (e.g. Banisteriopsis caapi or Peganum harmala)

terms.note: Beta-carbolines such as harmala alkaloids are mapped to TripSit's MAOI key.

wiki-combo-005.comment: Ayahuasca is drunk. Changa is smoked or vaped.

terms.note: No antiretroviral TripSit combo key exists.

wiki-combo-006.comment: Widespread use in South Africa. Whoonga is classically reputed to be a combination of heroin with antiretroviral drugs such as ritonavir and/or efavirenz, often combined with additional drugs such as cannabis or hashish, methamphetamine and/or methaqualone

wiki-combo-007.comment: When taken recreationally, a combination of benzodiazepine and psilocybin may soothe some of the more extreme negative effects often experienced during the peak and comedown phases of a psychedelic trip. Although benzodiazepines do not counteract the hallucinogenic and euphoric sensations caused by Psilocybin (commonly found in psilocybin mushrooms), they are sometimes administered by medical professionals to mitigate symptoms of a "bad trip." This practice helps to gradually relieve overactive sensory responses and induces relaxation in the individual, easing their mental state.

terms.note: Diphenhydramine is the only deliriant-like TripSit combo key present.

wiki-combo-010.comment: There is no official name for this combination; when an empathogen like MDMA is added to this combination, it becomes an Ali Flip.

wiki-combo-013.comment: A nicotini is any alcoholic drink which includes nicotine as an ingredient. Nicotine replacement therapy products such as mouth spray may be used.

wiki-combo-020.comment: Aztec use of entheogens. Conventional defatted cocoa dissolved in fat may be used instead of whole beans.

wiki-combo-021.comment: Low to moderate doses of CBD might reduce some of the paranoia, anxiety, and reduction of hippocampal volumes that the current high potency THC marijuana (in the last decades, THC content increased and CBD content decreased) can cause, if the CBD substitutes a part of the THC dose. Low doses of Kanna might also help counteract the anxiety.
